stepDescriptions.personal: basic user information and contact details

formDescriptions.personal: enter the user's personal and contact information
formDescriptions.security: configure authentication method and security settings
formDescriptions.access: configure user's organization membership and roles
formDescriptions.review: review and confirm user details before saving

fields.changePasswordNextLogin: require password change on next login

hints.enabled: disabled users cannot log in to the system
hints.changePasswordNextLogin: user will be required to set a new password after first login
hints.externalId: the unique identifier from the external identity provider
hints.organization: the organization where the user will have access
hints.roles: the roles that define the user's permissions
hints.group: optionally assign user to a group for easier management
hints.scopeLocal: user can only access the selected organization
hints.scopeRecursive: user can access the organization and all its sub-organizations
hints.groupSelection: user will inherit organization, roles, and scope from the selected group
hints.groupInheritance: the user will inherit all access permissions from the group. when the group is updated, all members are automatically updated.
hints.directWarning: direct assignment is harder to manage at scale. consider using groups for most users. only use direct assignment for special cases.
hints.multipleGroups: user will inherit roles from all selected groups
hints.multipleMemberships: each membership grants roles with its own scope

messages.allFieldsRequired: all fields marked with * are required
messages.emailExists: a user with this email already exists
messages.forbidden: you do not have permission to perform this action
messages.completeAllSteps: complete all steps to create a new user
messages.ssoInfo: when using SSO authentication, the user's password is managed by the identity provider. The external ID is used to link this account to the provider.
messages.reviewCreateSummary: review the information above before creating the user. click 'create user' to save.
messages.reviewEditSummary: review the changes above before updating the user. click 'update user' to save.
messages.noOrgContext: no organization selected. please select an organization from the sidebar first.

overview.title: Creation Steps
overview.description: This form is divided into 4 steps. Each step collects different information about the user.

step1.title: Personal Information
step1.description: Fill in the user's name, email, phone, and job title. Required fields are marked with *.

step2.title: Security Settings
step2.description: Choose the authentication method and configure password settings.

step3.title: Access Configuration
step3.description: Assign the user to a group or configure direct access with roles and scope.

step4.title: Review & Confirm
step4.description: Review all the information before saving. You can go back to edit any step.

validation.firstNameMinLength: first name must be at least 2 characters
validation.firstNameMaxLength: first name must be at most 100 characters
validation.lastNameMinLength: last name must be at least 2 characters
validation.lastNameMaxLength: last name must be at most 100 characters
validation.emailInvalid: please enter a valid email address
validation.emailMaxLength: email must be at most 254 characters
validation.jobTitleMaxLength: job title must be at most 120 characters
validation.passwordMinLength: password must be at least 8 characters
validation.passwordMaxLength: password must be at most 72 characters
validation.rolesRequired: at least one role is required
